Absolute returns The total return of a mutual fund over a given period. Returns and rankings Annualised returns Absolute returns Name 1M 3M 6M All Fund returns +0.4% +1.4% +3.2% +3.5% Category average ( Hybrid Arbitrage ) -- -- -- -- Rank ( Hybrid Arbitrage ) -- 27 24 -- Understand terms Expense ratio A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments. It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses. Tax A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments. Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund. Exit load A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment. Stamp duty A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security. Exit Load 24 Sep 2025 Exit load of 0.25%, if redeemed within 7 days. Exit load, stamp duty and tax Exit load Exit load of 0.25%, if redeemed within 7 days. Stamp duty on investment: 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020) from July 1st 2020 Tax implication If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

Also manages these schemes The Wealth Company Flexi Cap Fund Direct Growth The Wealth Company Ethical Fund Direct Growth The Wealth Company Arbitrage Fund Direct Growth The Wealth Company Multi Asset Allocation Fund Direct Growth The Wealth Company Balanced Advantage Fund Direct Growth The Wealth Company Small Cap Fund Direct Growth About The Wealth Company Arbitrage Fund Direct Growth The Wealth Company Arbitrage Fund Direct Growth is a Hybrid Mutual Fund Scheme launched by The Wealth Company Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 18 Jul 2025. Rouhak Shah is the Current Fund Manager of The Wealth Company Arbitrage Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹1112 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 07 May 2026 is ₹10.36. The The Wealth Company Arbitrage Fund Direct Growth is rated Low to Moderate risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹250. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹1000. Exit load of 0.25%, if redeemed within 7 days. ; Investment Objective The schemes seeks to generate income through arbitrage opportunities and debt and money market instruments. There is no assurance or guarantee that the investment objective of the Scheme will be achieved.

There is no assurance or guarantee that the investment objective of the Scheme will be achieved.
